element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Central to prequel storyline establishing series foundation
Foundational mechanic that dominates Langrisser series going forward
Player choice-based branching affecting female ally outcomes and game endings
Relationship tracking and affection changes based on player actions

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Non-linear progression with relationship management interspersed between tactical combat encounters

notable_level_patterns.description: Game functions as prequel to first two Langrisser titles, establishing foundational lore for Langrisser creation and genealogies
Non-linear relationship system creates multiple narrative paths based on player actions and ally affection mechanics
